faqs.question: What types of spiders are common in East Orange, NJ?
faqs.answer: East Orange residents commonly encounter house spiders, cellar spiders, wolf spiders, and jumping spiders. While most are harmless, some homeowners may also see black widows in undisturbed areas like basements, garages, and woodpiles. Our technicians can identify all species and implement targeted treatment plans.
